title: Pilot Decision and Build Handoff Room v4.8
recommendedDecision: Use v4.8 to convert private fake/sample rehearsal evidence into a controlled owner decision, blocker closure plan, and Decidim build handoff. Keep real participant intake, public onboarding, official Toastmasters workflows, and live Decidim access blocked until every critical owner vote passes privately.
operatingRule: Use v4.8 after the v4.7 rehearsal control room to turn rehearsal evidence into a private owner decision, blocker closure plan, Decidim build handoff, implementation-ticket backlog, and public-safe status line.
decisionRule: No single reviewer, developer, founder, provider, or comms owner can approve live intake. Each critical gate needs the named owner vote and evidence before any limited private pilot or live Decidim access can proceed.
buildRule: The static public demo is not a real Decidim app. Because the local self-build environment still has blocked dependencies, v4.8 keeps provider-assisted sandbox as the practical route unless Ruby, PostgreSQL, image tooling, email safety, backups, restore, delete, monitoring, and access controls are proven privately.
publicRule: Public pages may show fake/sample status, counts, route options, and aggregate learning only. They must not publish owner evidence, participant details, support cases, access logs, credentials, official Toastmasters records, cultural material, or business-sensitive data.
launchRule: v4.8 does not approve launch. It only creates the decision and handoff machinery needed to choose hold, repeat rehearsal, provider-assisted build, limited private pilot, no-go, or archive.

localDecidimStatus.githubCliAuth: hold: logged in as Shadow-3 without project scope
localDecidimStatus.node: hold: v24.14.0 detected; Decidim develop docs currently list Node 22.14.x for manual setup
localDecidimStatus.browserTestTooling: hold: Chromium/Playwright available through Codex tooling, not confirmed as project dependency
localDecidimStatus.decidimApp: blocked: no real Decidim app scaffold exists in this static package

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Confirm v4.8 is decision prep only.
decisionAgenda.evidenceRequired: Public demo package and safety note.
decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Meeting can proceed as private fake/sample decision prep.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Read the rehearsal count, critical issues, blocked signoffs, and acceptance checks.
decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Rehearsal evidence accepted for decision review.

decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Live intake remains blocked or authority gate moves to hold.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Ask whether participant notice, consent, withdrawal, and support routing are acceptable.
decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Private invitation remains blocked or consent gate moves to hold.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Ask whether custody, export, delete, archive, and retention can be evidenced.
decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Any real data processing remains blocked or moves to hold.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Ask whether the support route has a named owner and rehearsal pass.
decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Private invitation remains blocked or support gate moves to hold.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Confirm official Toastmasters systems and records stay outside Decidim.
decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Member workflow remains blocked or guest-only lane can repeat.

decisionAgenda.evidenceRequired: Barayamal owner note and data minimisation review.
decisionAgenda.decisionOutput: Barayamal lane hold, repeat, or limited private prep.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Receive Dean advisory comments as issues or tickets only.
Choose provider-assisted sandbox or self-build dependency preparation.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Compare build path against cost, dependency, support, security, data, and rollback needs.
Approve only tickets that can be worked safely with fake/sample data.
Approve a public status line that does not imply launch.

decisionAgenda.chairPrompt: Choose hold, repeat rehearsal, provider-assisted build, limited private pilot, no-go, or archive.

Dependencies installed or provider route chosen.

technicalBuildHandoff.acceptanceTest: P0/P1 tickets have owner, blocker, and acceptance test.

priorPilotRehearsalControlRoom.recommendedDecision: Use v4.7 as the current operating pack for private fake/sample rehearsals. Run the schedule, sign-off board, issue triage, sample-safe roster, acceptance scorecard, and handoff actions before any real participant intake or live Decidim access. Keep live launch blocked unless all critical owners pass privately.
